case_number: criminal revision application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. Application No.S-13 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.1745/2019 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For hearing of main case 26-03-2019 Syed Mukhtiar Hussain, Advocate for the applicant.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Matter is already fixed on 06.05.2019. Learned counsel for the applicant pleads urgency on the ground that this matter has become infructuous as the applicant has already been deported to Afghanistan, therefore, under instructions he does not press instant criminal revision application. Accordingly, urgency application is treated as an application for ante-date hearing of the case and the same is taken today and in view of the statement of the learned counsel for the applicant this criminal revision application is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
